prev.author: Amrut Prabhu
prev.summary: Tune Armbian’s PWM fan curve using a Device Tree Overlay. This step-by-step guide shows how to locate the pwm-fan node, edit cooling-levels and temp-trips, compile a .dtbo overlay, enable it in armbianEnv.txt, and verify fan speed changes in Linux
